stories.title: Texas A&M 9, No. 1 Texas 7 — 29-Game Win Streak OVER

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Texas A&M 9, No. 1 Texas 7.

The streak is OVER.

29 games. A new program record. All of it — snapped by No. 15 Texas A&M at McCombs Field on Sunday.

KK Dement, a six-run sixth inning, and a coach ejection later — the Longhorns finally lost. 🥎

#12thMan #HookEm #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Texas lost Sunday.

They also won the series 2-1. They're 31-2, 8-1 in SEC. Defending national champions.

One game. One great A&M performance. The Longhorns are fine.

Don't panic. Do appreciate the moment.

#HookEm #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Texas A&M Ends Texas's 29-Game Win Streak With 9-7 Upset in Austin

  2. "Texas A&M softball"
  3. "Ariel Kowalewski Texas A&M"

stories.title: Arkansas Walk-Off Stuns No. 5 Florida — Kennedy's 3-Run HR Wins Series

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Down 4-0. Bottom of the 7th. Two on. Two out.

Dakota Kennedy hits the first pitch she sees over the wall.

Arkansas 6, Florida 4. Walk-off. Series win. Fourth straight series win over Florida. 🥎

#WPS #GoGators #NCAASoftball

article.headline: Dakota Kennedy's Walk-Off Home Run Completes Arkansas's Stunning Comeback Over Florida

stories.title: Oklahoma 8, LSU 4 — OU Wins Series, Wells Hits HR No. 26

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Miali Guachino. 149 pitches. Complete game. 11 strikeouts.

Oklahoma wins Game 3 over LSU 8-4 behind Guachino's gem — and Kendall Wells hit home run No. 26.

Four away from the NCAA freshman record. With 20+ games left. 👀

#BoomerSooner #GeauxTigers #NCAASoftball

article.headline: Guachino's Complete Game and Wells's 26th HR Power Oklahoma Past LSU in Series Finale

stories.title: Nebraska 8, UCLA 4 — Huskers Win Series Over No. 7 Bruins

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Nebraska hit FOUR home runs in Sunday's series finale.

Three of them came in the second inning alone.

No. 9 Nebraska 8, No. 7 UCLA 4. Series win for the Huskers.

The Big Ten just keeps producing contenders. 🔥

#Huskers #GoBruins #NCAASoftball

stories.title: Kendall Wells at 26 HRs — Four Away From the Freshman Record

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells: 26 home runs.

Four away from the NCAA freshman record of 30 (Alo/Chamberlain/Majam).

Leading all of college softball. As a freshman. In March.

This record is absolutely in play. 🥎

#BoomerSooner #NCAASoftball #Softball

stories.title: Washington Combined No-Hitter Over Iowa — 19-Game Streak

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Sophia Ramuno and Rylee Rehbein combined for a no-hitter over Iowa on Saturday.

Washington wins 10-0. Their 12th shutout. Win streak: 19 games.

The Huskies are flying under the radar — and that should terrify everyone. 🥎

#NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball #Softball

stories.title: NFCA Week 8 Rankings Preview — Texas Drops, Who Rises?

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Texas drops from No. 1 on Tuesday.

29-game streak over — who takes the top spot?

Texas Tech untouched. Oklahoma 8-1 in SEC. Arkansas beat Florida four straight series.

The new rankings drop Tuesday. 👀

#NCAASoftball #SECSoftball #CollegeSoftball
